name: Cinnamon Sunrise Bread- Regular Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the water, flour, dry milk, brown sugar, salt, butter, cinnamon, pecan bits, and yeast to your bread machine in the order specified by the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Once all ingredients are added, close the lid securely.
3. Select the standard loaf setting on your bread machine.
4. Press the "Start" button to begin mixing the dough.
5. The machine will knead, proof, and bake the dough automatically according to the programmed settings.
6. When baking is complete, allow the bread to cool on a wire rack before slicing and serving.
Makes a 1 pound loaf.
